content: Kotlin Multiplatform 2.0 Gradle monorepo: use libs.versions.toml version catalog. Kotlin 2.0.21 is compatible with Gradle 8.7-8.10 (use 8.10.x wrapper, NOT Gradle 9.x which is unsupported). :shared module uses KMP plugin (org.jetbrains.kotlin.multiplatform), :androidApp uses com.android.application + org.jetbrains.kotlin.android. Java toolchain 21 via kotlin.jvmToolchain(21). AGP 8.2.2+ compatible with Kotlin 2.0.21. SKIE 0.10.12 compatible with Kotlin 2.0.21.
